title: Integration test: two devices same pub_id both receive
description:
Add a relay integration test verifying that two connections from the same pub_id both receive delivered messages, and that disconnecting one does not affect the other.

What: end-to-end integration test using the existing relay test harness pattern.

Algorithm:
1. Start an in-process relay (follow pattern from e2e_jsonrpc.rs or wasm_protocol.rs)
2. Create identity A. Connect device_1 (identity A) — authenticate, get into the main loop
3. Connect device_2 (identity A, same key) — authenticate separately
4. From a third client (identity B), broadcast a message
5. Assert device_1 receives the message
6. Assert device_2 receives the message
7. Disconnect device_1
8. Broadcast another message from B
9. Assert device_2 still receives it (device_1 disconnect did not affect device_2)

Oracle: known message strings sent by identity B, compared at each receiver.

Defensive rules:
- Test must not rely on message ordering beyond each client's own channel
- Use timeouts to avoid hanging if delivery fails
acceptance_criteria: Test passes; no existing tests regress; confirms multi-device delivery works end-to-end
